name: Meok Imo Marpol Marine Mcp
description: IMO MARPOL + marine fuel + container ship compliance MCP. MARPOL Annex VI, EU ETS maritime, CII, EEXI, IMDG, bunker fuel, ballast water, Port State Control. For short-sea operators, RoRo car carriers, Channel freight, container shipping. By MEOK AI Labs.
